jobs.name: hermes-daily-backup
jobs.prompt:
Run daily backup of Hermes configuration with secret redaction.

Task:
1. Copy critical files (.env, config.yaml, skills/, agents/, cron/, memories/, workspace/) to staging
2. Scan and replace secrets (API keys, tokens, passwords) with placeholders like [PLACEHOLDER]
3. Copy staged files to hermes-backup repo (git repo at ~/.hermes/backup_repo)
4. Commit with date + summary of files
5. Push to https://github.com/DifanaDAP/hermes-backup.git
6. If success: send one-liner to Discord #monitoring channel
7. If fail: report error to Discord

Important:
- Use GITHUB_TOKEN from environment variable (already set in cron job env)
- Skip JSON and MD file redaction (complex format)
- Report Discord with status emoji (✅ or ❌)

Run every day at 4:30 PM (GMT+7 / Asia/Jakarta)

jobs.name: Daily Hermes Session Cleanup
jobs.prompt:
Daily Hermes session cleanup before Fauzan turns off/resets sessions.

Task:
1. Prune Hermes session history older than 1 day by running: hermes sessions prune --older-than 1 --yes
2. Verify the command completed successfully by checking its exit code and output.
3. In the final response, summarize what was pruned/cleaned and include the model/provider used for this cron run. If the exact cron model/provider is not explicitly available, state that it used the configured default model/provider for Hermes cron.
